subcodes.title: Words to Fugeta, Dr. Esslemont et al, spoken on 1920-01-04
subcodes.first_line: When one is quiet the thing is forgotten. When discussion is forbidden the matter will be dropped... You cannot go according to an individual's conscience... It is the explicitly text that no one should disagree... The purpose of this is that no one may say that the House of Justice has made a mistake.
subcodes.subjects: @contention and conflict, @unity; oneness of humanity, @consultation, @House of Justice
